metadata.cross_validation: ✅ 全部 145 个 targetFiles 来自 sourceTask.outputFiles

testTasks.description: package.json 依赖完整性+scripts引用文件存在

testScenarios.then: express/mysql2/bcrypt/jsonwebtoken/cors/dotenv/ioredis/bull/node-cron/winston/multer 均在dependencies; vite/@vitejs/plugin-vue/vue/vue-router/pinia/axios 均在devDependencies
所有 script 命令引用的文件路径存在

testTasks.description: 4个env文件变量集一致性

testScenarios.then: 所有文件包含相同变量名集合: PORT/DB_HOST/DB_PORT/DB_USER/DB_PASSWORD/DB_NAME/REDIS_URL/JWT_SECRET/JWT_REFRESH_SECRET/JWT_EXPIRES_IN/ENCRYPTION_KEY/LOG_LEVEL/CORS_ORIGIN/NODE_ENV/ADMIN_EMAIL/ADMIN_PASSWORD/ADMIN_USERNAME/ELASTICSEARCH_HOST/PAYMENT_GATEWAY_SECRET/SNOWFLAKE_WORKER_ID
JWT_SECRET ≠ 'your_jwt_secret'
ENCRYPTION_KEY.length === 32

testTasks.description: 全局配置导出：pool/query/beginTransaction + exportStyle

testScenarios.then: exports包含 pool(连接池) + query(查询函数) + beginTransaction(事务函数)
exports包含 ioredis 客户端实例
exports包含 winston logger 实例(含error/warn/info/debug级别)

testTasks.description: 公共工具：响应封装签名+加密+雪花ID

testScenarios.then: success(res, data, message) — data为第二个参数(非第一个)
error(res, message, statusCode) 存在
exports包含 encrypt(data, key) + decrypt(data, key) 函数
exports包含 generate() → 唯一字符串ID

testTasks.description: 中间件导出+reqInjection声明

testScenarios.then: exports.authenticate 为 Express middleware 函数
authenticate 内部设置 req.user = { userId, role } 且 req.userId = number
exports包含 requireAdmin + requireMerchant (或类似角色检查函数)
exports 为 Express error-handling middleware (4参数签名 err,req,res,next)

testTasks.description: Express应用入口：中间件顺序+404

testScenarios.then: cors→json→auth→routes→errorHandler 顺序注册
cors() 中间件已注册(读取CORS_ORIGIN环境变量)
存在 app.use('*', ...) 或等效404处理器

testTasks.description: 数据库脚本：init-db覆盖+seed-users admin

testScenarios.then: SQL_FILES 数组包含 schema_db_tables_user.sql / schema_db_tables_category.sql / schema_db_tables_shop.sql / schema_db_tables_coupon.sql / schema_db_tables_product_core.sql / schema_db_tables_product_audit.sql / schema_db_tables_cart.sql / schema_db_tables_order_base.sql / schema_db_tables_payment.sql / schema_db_tables_refund.sql / schema_db_tables_search.sql
INSERT 语句创建 role='admin' 的用户

testTasks.description: 前端基础：入口+根组件+路由骨架

testScenarios.then: createApp(App).use(router).use(createPinia()).mount('#app') 调用链存在
<router-view /> 存在
router.beforeEach 检查 auth_token 并区分 requiresAuth/requiresAdmin

testTasks.description: 前端配置：Vite+HTML+全局样式

testScenarios.then: resolve.alias['@']→src目录；server.proxy '/api'→后端地址
存在 +
--color-primary: #FF6B35 或等效暖橙变量定义存在

testTasks.description: 前端Axios封装：token注入+401刷新

testScenarios.then: request interceptor 从 localStorage.getItem('auth_token') 读取并设置 Authorization: Bearer {token}
response interceptor 捕获401 → 调用 /api/auth/refresh → 失败则清除token跳/login
refresh也返回401时 → localStorage.removeItem('auth_token') → router.push('/login')

testTasks.description: 前端Store：user/cart状态结构

testScenarios.then: setToken action 内部 localStorage.setItem('auth_token', token)
state 包含 userId(numeric) + role(string) + token(string) + isLoggedIn(getter)
state 包含 items(array) + totalCount(getter) + totalPrice(getter)

testTasks.description: users表+addresses表 DDL vs model契约列名/类型/约束对照

testScenarios.then: 列名: id(int,PK,AI)/phone(varchar128,NOT NULL,UNIQUE)/password(varchar255,NOT NULL)/nickname(varchar50,DEFAULT'')/avatar(varchar255,DEFAULT'')/role(enum user,merchant,admin NOT NULL DEFAULT'user')/status(enum active,banned NOT NULL DEFAULT'active')/created_at(timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
列名: id(int,PK,AI)/user_id(int,NOT NULL)/province(varchar50)/city(varchar50)/district(varchar50)/detail(varchar255)/phone(varchar20)/name(varchar50)/is_default(tinyint1 DEFAULT0)/created_at(timestamp)
phone 列有 UNIQUE 索引
FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) 存在

testTasks.description: categories表 DDL vs model_category契约对照

testScenarios.then: 列名: id(int,PK,AI)/name(varchar50,NOT NULL)/parent_id(int,DEFAULT0)/sort(int,DEFAULT0)/status(enum active,disabled NOT NULL DEFAULT'active')/created_at(timestamp)
parent_id 列有索引

testTasks.description: shops表+merchant_qualifications表 DDL vs 契约对照

testScenarios.then: 列名: id(int,PK,AI)/user_id(int,NOT NULL)/name(varchar100,NOT NULL)/logo(varchar255)/description(text)/status(enum pending,active,frozen,cleared NOT NULL DEFAULT'pending')/commission_rate(decimal4,2 DEFAULT5.00)/created_at(timestamp)

列名: id(int,PK,AI)/shop_id(int,NOT NULL)/business_license(varchar255,NOT NULL)/legal_person_id(varchar255,NOT NULL)/bank_account(varchar255,NOT NULL)/status(enum pending,approved,rejected NOT NULL DEFAULT'pending')/reviewer_id(int)/review_note(text)/created_at(timestamp)
FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)
FOREIGN KEY (shop_id) REFERENCES shops(id)

testTasks.description: coupons表+user_coupons表 DDL vs 契约对照

testScenarios.then: 列名: id(int,PK,AI)/title(varchar100,NOT NULL)/amount(decimal10,2,NOT NULL)/min_order(decimal10,2,DEFAULT0.00)/valid_from(timestamp,NOT NULL)/valid_to(timestamp,NOT NULL)/status(enum active,disabled NOT NULL DEFAULT'active')/created_at(timestamp)
列名: id(int,PK,AI)/user_id(int,NOT NULL)/coupon_id(int,NOT NULL)/status(enum available,used,expired NOT NULL DEFAULT'available')/used_at(timestamp)/order_id(int)/created_at(timestamp)
(user_id, coupon_id) 联合UNIQUE索引存在

testTasks.description: products表+skus表 DDL vs 契约对照

testScenarios.then: 列名: id(int,PK,AI)/shop_id(int,NOT NULL)/category_id(int,NOT NULL)/title(varchar200,NOT NULL)/description(text)/status(enum draft,pending_review,approved,rejected,listed,delisted NOT NULL DEFAULT'draft')/main_image(varchar255)/created_at(timestamp)/updated_at(timestamp ON UPDATE)
列名: id(int,PK,AI)/product_id(int,NOT NULL)/spec_combo(varchar255,NOT NULL)/price(decimal10,2,NOT NULL)/stock(int,NOT NULL DEFAULT0)/image(varchar255)/created_at(timestamp)
FOREIGN KEY (shop_id) REFERENCES shops(id) + FOREIGN KEY (category_id) REFERENCES categories(id)
FOREIGN KEY (product_id) REFERENCES products(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

testTasks.description: product_snapshots表+audit_logs表 DDL vs 契约对照 + 日志表保护

testScenarios.then: 列名: id(int,PK,AI)/product_id(int,NOT NULL)/snapshot(json,NOT NULL)/version(int,NOT NULL DEFAULT1)/created_at(timestamp)
列名: id(int,PK,AI)/product_id(int,NOT NULL)/auditor_id(int,NOT NULL)/result(enum approved,rejected NOT NULL)/reason(text)/created_at(timestamp)
SQL内容不含 DROP TABLE product_snapshots 或 DROP TABLE audit_logs
FOREIGN KEY (product_id) REFERENCES products(id)

testTasks.description: carts表 DDL vs model_cart_item契约对照

testScenarios.then: 列名: id(int,PK,AI)/user_id(int,NOT NULL)/sku_id(int,NOT NULL)/quantity(int,NOT NULL DEFAULT1)/created_at(timestamp)
(user_id, sku_id) 联合UNIQUE索引存在
FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) + FOREIGN KEY (sku_id) REFERENCES skus(id)

testTasks.description: orders表+order_items表 DDL vs 契约对照

testScenarios.then: 列名: id(int,PK,AI)/order_no(varchar32,NOT NULL,UNIQUE)/user_id(int,NOT NULL)/shop_id(int,NOT NULL)/total_amount(decimal10,2,NOT NULL)/discount_amount(decimal10,2,DEFAULT0.00)/pay_amount(decimal10,2,NOT NULL)/status(enum pending_pay,paid,shipped,received,completed,cancelled,refunding DEFAULT'pending_pay')/pay_method(varchar20)/pay_time(timestamp)/ship_time(timestamp)/receive_time(timestamp)/created_at(timestamp)/updated_at(timestamp ON UPDATE)
列名: id(int,PK,AI)/order_id(int,NOT NULL)/sku_id(int,NOT NULL)/sku_snapshot(json,NOT NULL)/quantity(int,NOT NULL)/unit_price(decimal10,2,NOT NULL)/created_at(timestamp)
order_no 有 UNIQUE 索引
FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT + FOREIGN KEY (shop_id) REFERENCES shops(id)
FOREIGN KEY (order_id) REFERENCES orders(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

testTasks.description: payments表 DDL vs model_payment契约对照

testScenarios.then: 列名: id(int,PK,AI)/order_id(int,NOT NULL)/user_id(int,NOT NULL)/amount(decimal10,2,NOT NULL)/channel(enum wxpay,alipay NOT NULL)/trade_no(varchar64)/status(enum pending,paid,refunding,refunded,closed DEFAULT'pending')/paid_at(timestamp)/refund_amount(decimal10,2,DEFAULT0.00)/created_at(timestamp)
FOREIGN KEY (order_id) REFERENCES orders(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

testTasks.description: refunds表 DDL vs model_refund契约对照

testScenarios.then: 列名: id(int,PK,AI)/order_id(int,NOT NULL)/payment_id(int,NOT NULL)/user_id(int,NOT NULL)/merchant_id(int,NOT NULL)/reason(varchar500,NOT NULL)/amount(decimal10,2,NOT NULL)/evidence_images(json)/status(enum applied,approved,rejected,processing,completed DEFAULT'applied')/apply_at(timestamp)/processed_at(timestamp)/completed_at(timestamp)
FOREIGN KEY (order_id) REFERENCES orders(id) ON DELETE CASCADE + FOREIGN KEY (payment_id) REFERENCES payments(id)

testTasks.description: search_logs表 DDL vs 契约对照 + 日志表保护 + FK执行顺序

testScenarios.then: 列名: id(int,PK,AI)/user_id(int)/query(varchar200,NOT NULL)/filters(json)/result_count(int,DEFAULT0)/clicked_product_ids(json)/created_at(timestamp)

testTasks.description: Token签发链: 注册→token可验证→登录→相同格式token

testScenarios.then: res.data.token 为JWT格式(三段.base64); res.data.refreshToken 存在; res.data.userId 为number; res.data.role 为string
res.data.token 与注册时格式相同; res.status = 200

testScenarios.when: 携带 Authorization: Bearer {token} 访问需认证接口
testScenarios.then: 认证通过(非401)

testTasks.description: Token刷新链: refresh→新token有效→旧token 401

testScenarios.then: res.data.token 为新的JWT; res.data.refreshToken 为新值
返回401
res.status = 401

testTasks.description: Middleware注入: req.userId + req.user 注入验证

testScenarios.then: req.userId 赋值为 token.payload.userId(parseInt) 确保 number 类型
req.user = { userId: number, role: string }
无 Authorization header 时返回 401

testTasks.description: 前端Token存储: localStorage key + header格式 + 401刷新

testScenarios.then: setToken 内部 localStorage.setItem('auth_token', token)

testTasks.description: 路由守卫: requiresAuth→跳/login; requiresAdmin→跳/

testScenarios.then: meta.requiresAuth=true 的路由在未登录时 router.push('/login')
meta.requiresAdmin=true 的路由在 role≠admin 时 router.push('/') 或等效处理
已有token时访问 /login 或 /register redirect到 /

testScenarios.given: SKU stock=100 + 100个用户并发下单各买1件
testScenarios.then: 成功订单数≤100; skus.stock=0; 无超卖(成功数+剩余库存=100)

testTasks.description: 支付回调幂等: 同一回调3次仅1条paid记录

testScenarios.scenario: 同一回调发送3次仅处理1次
testScenarios.when: POST /api/payments/callback 连续发送3次相同 { tradeNo, orderNo, status:'SUCCESS' }
testScenarios.then: payments.status='paid'; payments 表中仅1条记录更新; orders 中无重复状态变更

testTasks.description: SQL注入防护: 搜索参数含注入语句不执行

testScenarios.then: res.status=200; 返回正常搜索结果(空或兜底); 数据库不受影响
res.status=200; 不泄露用户数据

testTasks.description: XSS防护: 商品标题/描述含script不执行

testScenarios.then: 存储时转义或过滤; GET 返回时 title 不含可执行 script 标签
返回内容不直接反射未转义的HTML标签

testTasks.description: Token过期处理: 篡改过期Token→401

testScenarios.given: 生成一个 exp 为过去时间的JWT
testScenarios.when: Authorization: Bearer {expiredToken} 访问需认证接口
testScenarios.then: res.status=401
res.status=401
res.status=401

testTasks.description: 分页边界: page=-1修正为1; pageSize=10000截断

testScenarios.then: 不报错; 按page=1返回(或返回400参数错误)
pageSize被限制到最大值(如100); 不返回10000条
按page=1返回

testTasks.description: 敏感数据保护: 日志无明文密码/手机号/Token

testScenarios.then: 日志输出中 req.body.password 被遮蔽(显示为 ***)
Authorization header 值被截断(仅记录前10字符)或完全遮蔽

testScenarios.scenario: 日志不记录明文手机号
testScenarios.then: req.body.phone 被脱敏(如 138****1234)

testTasks.description: CORS: 非白名单Origin拒绝

testScenarios.then: res.headers['access-control-allow-origin'] 存在
res.status=204; allow-origin/allow-methods/allow-headers 存在

testTasks.description: 登录频率限制: 5次/天限制

testScenarios.then: res.status=429; 返回 RATE_LIMITED 错误
